query: sickly yellow green tint photograph unhealthy skin tone
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — yellow/green sickly tints, jaundice and unhealthy color casts

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up of a person's face from the eyebrows to the chin. The individual has wide-open light-colored eyes, visible eyebrows, a nose in the center of the frame, and lips pressed together. Light facial hair grows along the jawline and upper lip. Skin texture including pores and fine lines is visible across the face.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extreme close-up of a person's face rendered at an unconventional, magnified scale that distorts ordinary facial proportions and fills the frame from the eyebrows to the chin. The individual has wide-open light-colored eyes, visible eyebrows, a nose in the center of the frame, and lips pressed together. Light facial hair grows along the jawline and upper lip. A sickly yellow-orange color cast washes over the entire scene, shifting the skin toward an unhealthy, artificial hue reminiscent of sodium vapor lighting, with pores and skin texture visible beneath the lurid tone.
